title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology examines OpenClaw security risks affecting autonomous AI agents, covering vulnerabilities including prompt injection and credential exposure. The analysis highlights how agent autonomy, tools, and memory create real-world security challenges and discusses safe deployment practices.
